summary: Patched run.py so same-fingerprint distribution-architecture repairs are no longer invalidated by auto-refreshed latest-artifact mtimes, added regression coverage, and verified the live hold-window run reused the existing guard artifact instead of minting another duplicate repair.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: active lane truth is still distribution_architecture_guard_pause in the hold window
outcome_execution_board_latest.json: runner reuse was already repaired, so the remaining churn source was run.py
marketing_2026-05-26_192143_distribution_architecture_churn_guard_repair.json: duplicate same-fingerprint repair churn was still being emitted by the main marketing loop
marketing_2026-05-26_194110_outcome_runner_reuse_repair.md: standalone runner had already been fixed, isolating the remaining bug to main-loop reuse/staleness logic
